hero.name: Sodikov Diyorbek.
hero.description: 16-year-old Frontend Dev, IT Park Resident, and Startup Founder. Specialized in React, Vite, and scaling ideas into investments.

stack.description: Tools I wield daily — and the next-gen tech I'm actively conquering.
stack.ai_desc: Building autonomous agent pipelines with LLM APIs, function calling, and multi-step reasoning systems.
stack.go_desc: Mastering goroutines, channels, and sync primitives to build high-throughput backend services.

projects.description: Real projects. Real wins. Each one built to solve a problem and compete at the highest level. This is where the rubber meets the road — and the future takes shape.
projects.combined_sub: Building the ecosystem of tomorrow, one MVP at a time.
projects.ss_description: Gamified education platform for grades 5–8 that transforms complex STEM subjects into interactive quests and challenges, making learning addictive.
projects.nukta_description: Decentralized 'Airbnb for retail' — enabling merchants to share and sublease unused retail space on demand. Built in 24 hours at IDEATHON.
projects.storage_description: Anonymous school file-sharing ecosystem built with end-to-end privacy principles. Enables secure document exchange without identity exposure.
projects.storage_ach2: Best Innovation Award — Tashkent Tech Week

experience.step_desc: 2-year intensive program covering full-stack development, algorithms, and software architecture. Top of class in web technologies.
experience.self_desc: Independently mastering LLM integration, prompt engineering, and AI-agent orchestration — applying concepts directly to product features.
experience.itpark_desc: Accepted as a resident of IT Park Uzbekistan — accessing startup infrastructure, mentorship network, and investor connections.
experience.t1_text: Diyorbek is the frontend engine. He turns wireframes into reality at hackathon speed.
experience.t2_text: The perfect mix of technical skill and "nice guy" vibe. Great leader who keeps the team energized under pressure.
experience.t3_text: His obsession with realistic animations and UX is what wins us prizes. Nobody sweats the details like Diyorbek.

footer.cta_desc: Whether it's a startup, a hackathon, or an ambitious side project — I'm always looking for the next big problem to solve.
